name: nimblebrain
description: Self-hosted platform for MCP Apps and agent automations — tools, interactive UIs, scheduled runs, multi-agent delegation
author: NimbleBrain, Inc. <oss@nimblebrain.ai>

scripts.dev:docs-demo: NB_DEV_DISPLAY_NAME='Sarah Chen' NB_DEV_EMAIL='sarah@acme.co' NB_API_PORT=27253 NB_WEB_PORT=27252 bun run scripts/dev.ts --port 27253 --config .environments/docs-demo/nimblebrain.json
scripts.install:bundles: for ui in src/bundles/*/ui; do [ -f "$ui/package.json" ] && (cd "$ui" && bun install); done
scripts.build:bundles: for ui in src/bundles/*/ui; do [ -f "$ui/package.json" ] && (cd "$ui" && bun install && bun run build); done
scripts.test:bundles: for ui in src/bundles/*/ui; do if [ -f "$ui/package.json" ] && [ -n "$(find "$ui/src" -name '*.test.ts' -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]; then (cd "$ui" && bun test) || exit 1; fi; done
scripts.check:codegen: bun run codegen && git diff --exit-code web/src/_generated/
scripts.verify: bun run verify:static && bun run verify:test-unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.verify:static: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run check && bun run check:web && bun run check:theme && bun run check:cycles && bun run check:bundle-transport && bun run check:workspace-paths && bun run check:conversation-paths && bun run check:personal-workspace-id && bun run check:tool-namespace && bun run check:credential-paths && bun run check:public-origin && bun run check:file-paths && bun run check:automation-paths && bun run check:code-style && bun run check:no-raw-console && bun run check:no-sentry-in-kernel && bun run check:no-control-bytes && bun run check:codegen
scripts.verify:test-unit: bun run test:unit && bun run test:web && bun run test:bundles
scripts.lint: bunx @biomejs/biome check src/ instrument/ scripts/ web/src/
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write src/ web/src/ instrument/ scripts/
scripts.format:check: bunx @biomejs/biome format src/ web/src/ instrument/ scripts/
